baseline_prompt: She's been dealing with sleep-onset insomnia lately, so before turning in she takes a
dialects: rung 1 of 5 - fully formal clinical register
rung 2 of 5 - mostly clinical register, one everyday word allowed
rung 3 of 5 - even mix of clinical and everyday phrasing
rung 4 of 5 - mostly casual everyday phrasing
rung 5 of 5 - maximally casual spoken phrasing with slang
